parallelogram_completion_label: Which lettered point completes a parallelogram with the three unlabeled points?
Choose the candidate point that forms a parallelogram with the three unlabeled points.

Find the lettered point that completes the parallelogram.
Which lettered point is the missing vertex of a parallelogram?

scene:coordinate_quadrilateral_candidate.object_description: a coordinate grid with three unlabeled points and lettered candidate points
scene:coordinate_quadrilateral_candidate.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter as a capital letter
scene:coordinate_quadrilateral_candidate.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at the center of the selected candidate point
